codeReview.summary: Clean, well-structured implementation that fully meets all feature requirements. Title bar redesigned with [icon] Untitled on left and HH:MM:SS clock on right. 'Document OS' and 'Multi-Surface Compositor' branding removed. New img-icon.svg (picture frame + landscape shape) clearly differs from doc-icon.svg. Both icons loaded at boot via 9p shared buffer, sent to compositor via separate IPC messages (MSG_ICON_CONFIG and MSG_IMG_ICON_CONFIG). Compositor switches icon based on IMAGE_MODE on Ctrl+Tab. Clock rendered with CHROME_CLOCK color using proportional font. Timer-driven title bar re-rendering with dirty rects (1280x36 partial transfer) handles clock updates efficiently. 4 new tests cover parsing, rasterization, visual differentiation, and frame border structure. Code follows existing patterns (heap-allocated SVG structs, leaked coverage maps, same rasterization pipeline).

issues.description: Missing OOM error logging for image icon SVG parsing. The doc icon block (line ~1160) logs 'compositor: SVG path alloc failed (OOM)' and 'compositor: SVG scratch alloc failed (OOM)' when allocations fail, but the image icon block silently falls through on allocation failure. Should add matching OOM diagnostics for consistency.

~80 lines of code duplicated between doc icon SVG parsing (line ~1120) and image icon SVG parsing (line ~1225). Both follow the identical pattern: allocate SvgPath + SvgRasterScratch, parse, rasterize at 20x24, leak coverage, dealloc scratch. Could be extracted into a helper function. Acceptable given bare-metal constraints but increases maintenance burden.

Font Pipeline section still says 'mono font | prop font | PNG image | SVG icon' (singular) but the shared buffer now contains two SVG icons: 'mono font | prop font | PNG image | doc-icon SVG | img-icon SVG'. Documentation is stale.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md says 'Types 1-7 = config messages' for IPC message type allocation, but MSG_IMG_ICON_CONFIG was allocated as type 9, and MSG_GPU_READY is type 8. The stated range should be updated to 'Types 1-9 = config/setup messages' to reflect reality.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md line 25 says 'Types 1-7 = config messages, 8 = MSG_GPU_READY'. Compositor main.rs line 41: MSG_IMG_ICON_CONFIG = 9. Init main.rs line 70: MSG_IMG_ICON_CONFIG = 9.

sharedStateObservations.observation: architecture.md Font Pipeline section says shared buffer layout is 'mono font | prop font | PNG image | SVG icon' but actual layout is now 'mono font | prop font | PNG image | doc-icon SVG | img-icon SVG' (two SVG icons). The init code at line ~1015 confirms the extended layout.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md line 60 vs system/services/init/main.rs lines 988-1015 where img_icon_offset = mono_len + prop_len + png_len + icon_len.

sharedStateObservations.observation: architecture.md Multi-Surface Compositing section says 'F1 key switches modes' but context switching actually uses Ctrl+Tab. This is a pre-existing stale reference not introduced by this feature, but worth correcting.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md line 76: 'F1 key switches modes'. Compositor main.rs line ~1557: key.keycode == KEY_TAB && ctrl_pressed triggers IMAGE_MODE toggle.

summary: Feature passes review. All 7 expected behaviors are fully implemented: title bar shows [icon] Untitled + clock, branding removed, icon switches on Ctrl+Tab, proportional font used, clock updates every second. Implementation is clean and follows established patterns. 4 new tests (852 total passing). Three non-blocking issues noted: missing OOM logging in image icon parsing, code duplication between the two icon parsing blocks, and a stale architecture doc reference. Three shared state observations: IPC type range in AGENTS.md needs widening (1-7 → 1-9), shared buffer layout doc is stale (1 icon → 2 icons), and a pre-existing F1/Ctrl+Tab doc discrepancy.
